text.title: Insight-to-Design-Ticket Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding Insight-to-Design-Ticket. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Every ticket carries four sections: insight, hypothesis, success-metric, design-constraints; tickets missing any section are rejected.
rule.rationale: Free-shape tickets decay; fixed shape makes prioritisation and AI consumption deterministic.

rule.statement: Hypothesis is in IF / THEN form ('IF we add a progress bar THEN step-3 dropoff falls below 25%'); intent-only hypotheses are rejected.
rule.rationale: IF / THEN hypotheses are falsifiable; intent-only ('improve onboarding') guarantees ambiguous outcomes.

rule.statement: Success-metric field is either a measurable target ('step-3 dropoff < 25%') OR explicitly 'no-metric — qualitative validation'; ambiguous targets are rejected.
rule.rationale: Some insights are qualitative; the explicit 'no-metric' branch keeps the ticket honest without forcing metrics that do not exist.

rule.statement: Design constraints name brand / tokens / a11y / motion / regulatory items explicitly; 'standard constraints apply' is rejected.
rule.rationale: Generic 'standard constraints' produce out-of-tone designs; named constraints anchor the work.

rule.statement: Every ticket carries an evidence_link (session replay, research note, metric snapshot); prose-only evidence is rejected.
rule.rationale: Unevidenced tickets are opinion tickets; the link lets future agents re-litigate.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do NOT run this methodology — emit a skip-record naming the failed precondition and route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above for flat methodologies), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-insight-to-design-ticket.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
